phase_name: Phase 4: Autonomy Hardening Safety Policy Uplift
evidence_summary: Four-gate retained-edit validation chain implemented and hardened in bin/stage3_manager.py. Gate 1: py_compile/.json/sh -n. Gate 2: naming-convention primary, reference-scan fallback, smoke fallback for zero-coverage targets. Gate 3: make check. Gate 4: quick_check.sh on explicit target via detect_changed_files.sh CLI arg invocation. Revert-failure escalation correct across all four gates: accepted=False, classification=revert_failure_dirty_state, fatal SystemExit. Gate observability trace fields in every entry. 81 gate tests passing at cb18558. Phase 4 objective achieved.
